title: Vectra Handoff Artifact (Execution Receipt)
description: Schema for handoff artifacts produced by sub-agents. Matches the ATP handoff-artifact spec.

bundle_id.description: Unique bundle identifier linking this receipt to the spawned job

protocol_id.description: ATP protocol that governed this execution

changes.description: List of changes made during execution

var_updates.description: Variable file updates resulting from execution

next_action.description: Recommended next action after this job

state_after.description: Snapshot of relevant state after execution
